main.description: A privacy-preserving aggregate of one user's browsing activity over a bounded window (typically one day). Raw high-frequency events (cursor, viewport, keyboard) stay in the local/realtime layer; only these summaries are written to the user's PDS. The record key SHOULD be the window start date, e.g. "2026-06-28".

domains.description: Per-domain activity aggregates for the window.

activeMs.description: Foreground/active time on the domain during the window, in milliseconds.

visits.description: Number of distinct visits/navigations to the domain in the window.

hourlyActiveMs.description: 24-element array of active milliseconds per local-time hour bucket.
